mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notifications ( user_id, type, title, message, target_url ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{message}, #{targetUrl} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, type, title, message, target_url AS target_url, (read_at IS NOT NULL) AS read, read_at AS read_at, created_at AS created_at FROM notifications WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND ( read_at IS NULL OR read_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' ) ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notifications WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND read_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE notifications SET read_at = COALESCE(read_at, NOW()) WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND read_at IS NULL
